task_completion.description: The document is saved as aar_formatted.docx
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor should display 'aar_formatted.docx'.

task_completion.description: The first two paragraphs (Title and Subtitle) are center-aligned
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title and subtitle at the very top of the document should be visually centered on the page.

task_completion.description: Body text is set to Liberation Sans or Arial at 11pt
task_completion.visual_evidence: When body text is selected or visible, the font toolbar should show 'Liberation Sans' or 'Arial' and the font size should be '11'.

task_completion.description: Page margins are set to 1.0 inch
task_completion.visual_evidence: The horizontal and vertical rulers in the word processor should show the white area (printable area) starting at 1 inch from the edges.

task_completion.description: Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles are applied to the specified sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sections like 'Incident Summary', 'Incident Timeline', etc., should appear larger and bolder (Heading 1), while subsections like 'Fire Suppression', 'Search and Rescue', etc., should have Heading 2 styling. The style dropdown in the toolbar should reflect these styles when the cursor is on them.

task_completion.description: The plaintext timeline is converted into a 3-column table with specific headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Incident Timeline' section, there should be a 3-column table with the headers 'Time', 'Unit/Source', and 'Action/Description'. The original plaintext timeline lines should no longer be present.

task_completion.description: A footer is included with the page number
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the bottom of the document pages, there should be a footer area containing the page number.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a word processor like LibreOffice Writer, with evidence of GUI interactions (e.g., using menus, toolbars, or dialog boxes for formatting).

integrity.description: The original document content was preserved and not overwritten or deleted
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should still contain the original text, such as '1847 Industrial Parkway', 'Metro City Fire Department', 'wet-pipe sprinkler system', and 'Battalion 2'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as 'aar_formatted.docx'. Required Heading 1 sections: 'Incident Summary', 'Incident Timeline', 'Tactical Operations', 'Personnel and Equipment', 'Findings and Recommendations', 'Conclusion'. Required Heading 2 sections: 'Fire Suppression', 'Search and Rescue', 'Ventilation', 'Recommendations for Training'. Content integrity phrases to verify the original text wasn't deleted: '1847 Industrial Parkway', 'Metro City Fire Department', 'wet-pipe sprinkler system', and 'Battalion 2'.
